data.body: CHECKPOINT 3+4: tests/hooks/test-worktree-merge-conflict.sh created with 3 structural lifecycle tests. All pass: PASSED: 21 FAILED: 0. One bug fixed during authoring: grep -c exits 1 on zero matches, which caused a double-output issue with || echo '0' under pipefail — switched to grep -q with conditional assignment. Tests verify real git conflict lifecycle (conflict exit non-zero, abort succeeds, directory retained) without calling unwritten production code.
